name: Y-Yare Head
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｙ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ワイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ドラゴン・イアヘッド
desc: If this card is Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Level 4 LIGHT Machine monster from your hand or GY to this card as an Equip Spell, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT monsters. Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 Machine monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Level 4 LIGHT Machine monster from your hand or GY to this card as an Equip Spell, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT monsters. Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 Machine monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Level 4 LIGHT Machine monster from your hand or GY to this card as an Equip Spell, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT monsters. Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 Machine monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand to itself
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
